platform.name: Platinum
platform.notes: Platform-owned shell, release lanes, docs, replay, services, and host contract.

development.notes: Hosted /dev uses a fourth visible segment to count accumulated post-production integration increments while package.json remains SemVer.

latestReleaseNote.title: Hosted dev conformance review
latestReleaseNote.summary: Prepared the post-production hosted-dev review increment with refreshed conformance dashboards, public documentation, resource-economics reporting, application artifact scoring, runtime sprite-capture scoring, and a measured calibrated ship-loss audio cue improvement. This is the beta-request package for release-authority review, not a production promotion.
